user.getById: SELECT id, name, email, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = $1 LIMIT 1;
user.getByEmail: SELECT id, name, email, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE email = $1 LIMIT 1;
user.getByName: SELECT id, name, email, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE name = $1 LIMIT 1;
user.updateProfile: UPDATE users SET name = $2, email = $3 WHERE id = $1 RETURNING id, name, email, created_at, updated_at;
user.list: SELECT id, name, email, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE ($1 = '' OR name ILIKE $2 OR email ILIKE $2) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT $3 OFFSET $4;
user.count: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total FROM users WHERE ($1 = '' OR name ILIKE $2 OR email ILIKE $2);
user.search: SELECT id, name, email FROM users WHERE ($1 = '' OR name ILIKE $1 OR email ILIKE $1) ORDER BY name ASC LIMIT $2;
user.getByIds: SELECT id, name, email FROM users WHERE id = ANY($1::uuid[]) ORDER BY name ASC;
